Our Story

Family Craftsmanship,
Timeless Elegance

Aftab Brothers was founded by Aftab Khan with a single sewing machine and an eye for beauty. Today, we are Pakistan's most trusted name in premium window treatments — combining traditional craftsmanship with modern design sensibilities.

Every curtain we create is a collaboration between artisan and client. From selection of imported fabrics to final installation, we ensure an experience as refined as the product itself.

5,000+
Happy Homes
150+
Fabric Choices
48h
Quick Install
What We Offer

Our Services

From measurement to installation, we handle everything — so you can simply enjoy the result.

Custom Curtains

Tailored to your exact window dimensions and personal style. Choose from over 150 imported and local fabrics, linings, and trims.

Roller & Venetian Blinds

Modern light-control solutions for offices and contemporary homes. Available in blackout, light-filtering, and sheer varieties.

Alterations & Repairs

Breathe new life into your existing window treatments. We re-hem, re-line, update hardware, and restore aged curtains.

Home Visit & Measurement

Our experts visit your home, assess your space, and recommend the perfect styles — completely free of charge.

Professional Installation

Trained installers ensure perfect hanging, with no damage to your walls. We tidy up and leave your space spotless.

Commercial Projects

Hotels, offices, restaurants, and showrooms — we handle large-scale projects with dedicated project management.

Our Work

Our Difference

Why Pakistan Trusts
Aftab Brothers

We don't just sell curtains — we deliver an end-to-end experience rooted in quality, honesty, and lasting relationships with every client.

01

Premium Imported Fabrics

We source exclusive fabrics from Turkey, China, and the UAE — materials you won't find in ordinary stores.

02

Precision Stitching

Our master tailors have decades of experience. Every seam is straight, every pleat is perfect.

03

On-Time Delivery

We commit to deadlines. Most orders are ready and installed within 5–7 business days.

04

After-Sale Support

Free adjustment visits within 30 days and honest guidance on care — because our relationship doesn't end at installation.
